name: Do I qualify for workers comp if I slipped and hurt my back at work?
description: Yes, if in course of employment and work aggravated it—report and document[1][3].

mainEntity.name: Do I qualify for workers comp if I slipped and hurt my back at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if in course of employment and work aggravated it—report and document[1][3].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Most workplace back injuries qualify if 'arising out of and in the course of employment.'** Falls on hard floors can be compensable if work conditions worsened injury[3]. Exclusions apply for non-work activities[1]. **Key factors:** Prove accident happened at work, medical evidence of injury, not idiopathic without work aggravation. **Practical guidance:** Report immediately, get evaluated by approved doctors, gather witness statements. Avoid signing anything waiving rights. **Utah Labor Commission handles disputes[1].**
